original_text:
### Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine → 75% Gold | `#faa31b` → Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
- Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
- Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

relations.note: Defines the required masthead/banner gradient, direction, and logo-mark placement within the approved gradient set.

rules.intent: Preserve the finite approved gradient palette and its designated applications.
rules.rule_text: Use only the approved gradient set; never invent gradients. Use Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue mastheads/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds and waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold at 75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; and Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold at 75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds. Approved gradients may be used as backgrounds, with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

quotes: | Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Ensure masthead/logo contrast and the approved horizontal gradient direction.
rules.rule_text: For mastheads and banners, use the Sunshine → light gold masthead gradient (#faa31b → #ffe05c) horizontally from dark/saturated to light, left to right. This is the gradient used with the LISRAYA logo mark for contrast; place the mark at the lightest end.

rules.intent: Bind the Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients) table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine → 75% Gold | `#faa31b` → Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
